No. 896(E), dated 26.03.2014. 1. Table 1 of the Notification, shall be extended by adding the following rows: “ Gujarat 85 1680 (E) 21.07.2011 Undvaria 86 625(E) 12.03.2013 Khemana 87 844 (E) 27.04.2011 Surajbari 88 2923(E) 17.12.2012 Kathpur 89 2922 (E) 17.12.2012 Vantada 90 624(E) 12.03.2013 Vaghasia ” [F. No. NHAI/13013/ CO/ 2013-14] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy.
